name: ACT 10 ALERT via Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Will you help SAVE ACT 10?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Gov. Evers wants to cancel Act 10, and Congress wants to ban it! PeterTen years ago this week, **Wisconsin's historic Act 10** was signed into law. As the Senate Majority Leader, I was **proud** to lead the fight that truly delivered for Wisconsin taxpayers. **_BUT TONY EVERS IS TRYING TO **END** ACT 10 IN HIS BUDGET PROPOSAL!_****_AND LIBERALS IN WASHINGTON ARE PUSHING TO UNDO OUR STATE REFORMS ACROSS THE COUNTRY._**[Will you help me fight back? DEFEND Act 10, and bring our reforms to Washington! ](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtrtldl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [Donate $10 for Act 10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtrtldl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [$45 - Average WI Donation](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtrtldl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtrtldl-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Earlier this week, I spoke in front of Congress to STRONGLY OPPOSE a bill that would overturn Right To Work in 27 states.In the WI Senate, I authored our Right To Work law. I've seen firsthand how it has **delivered** for workers by giving them their own power (and money) back, instead of handing it over to the union bosses.I'm going to keep fighting in Congress for our workers, and against the liberal special interests who take advantage of them.Please, ten years after Act 10 launched a revolution in taxpayer savings and pro-worker reforms, take a moment to **[join my campaign **and defend Act 10!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtrtldl-ahkdjtlkr-i/)** -Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtrtldl-ahkdjtlkr-d/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mtrtldl-ahkdjtlkr-h/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mtrtldl-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-mtrtldl-ahkdjtlkr-u/)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
Last week we announced several new TNDP team members that will help lead the charge towards turning Tennessee blue in 2022. In the coming weeks there will be more. If we are going to Defeat Bill Lee and his corrupt GOP, we need staff with the talent and drive to get it done. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.
Our mid-March fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and we’re still $6,870 short. To be blunt, hiring exceptional staff means we have to be able to pay them. I remain committed to doing absolutely everything in my power to defeating Bill Lee and turning Tennessee blue in 2022, but I can only do it with your support.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/TEAM%20TNDP%202021-1.jpg]
Will you make a donation right now, and help us continue to meet these critical goals? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.

The border is not open?? Then what do you call this RECORD surge in illegal immigrants penetrating our border.

One of the Biden Admin's first actions in power was to HALT construction of President Trump's border wall. They literally left the border open on purpose, invited all of these caravans of illegal immigrants, and now LIE to the American people like we're dumb.

[**Friend, add your name to join State Republicans in DEMANDING action to end to the crisis on the border:**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OE7D8fRocrdcnPqqCBBX6S1AGa3my1Cqk_pyoTxSShqyqKoan0da1ZZTfSwSC_zRzu2yG1waV2Da-NEa4gjXA_i3vFYwFF5lzjf3AhlVUvAgry-DCc8CRSUbA-VLudcVviwvXJyFrhEfVPqOksTt4RzusfWAmCTctqt9dH8WaDz4tSYUSrc8MVzw6do3vpTXdFTD8hOyqKRdXIvXC81WnHujyTIFTCv2BYafZ8msjA3NeKx73GJBl3AWZmHulgvvaUEYxEQ-9OKFh2ioWzZGz3yAEgMDefuHEoKugTLNx-4AGNfg93TWrrdUk6wU56XfDBa-hPI7r-ecP4obBcL8vXhBr4CWruBzpa2lC6Hz2UbQFYH_iLsOgbHQ7FPy-IegDls71cbhgcZE44ibtT2fAA==&c=N6izYM3UdiiCf2KGYWGi6WE_FzSnHF6o4UPc5Ahc3KBg8512hKAU0w==&ch=nUNOxPHnmvP43hHL1Te9fbvvyR1dTiwbEZc4WqpAIYBgKp_VCT3Kiw==)

****

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OE7D8fRocrdcnPqqCBBX6S1AGa3my1Cqk_pyoTxSShqyqKoan0da1S9dFyCIbT-4SBydlbdREzzRxN9UMpQQY7agQEacWv1hfRTfo7Fw4g3l6zcYSbIWavmQLf0WDdGcY7m2uQLR7xw=&c=N6izYM3UdiiCf2KGYWGi6WE_FzSnHF6o4UPc5Ahc3KBg8512hKAU0w==&ch=nUNOxPHnmvP43hHL1Te9fbvvyR1dTiwbEZc4WqpAIYBgKp_VCT3Kiw==).

clean_body: Biden abandons border states and the rule of law == ****==** The border is not open?? Then what do you call this RECORD surge in illegal immigrants penetrating our border. One of the Biden Admin's first actions in power was to HALT construction of President Trump's border wall. They literally left the border open on purpose, invited all of these caravans of illegal immigrants, and now LIE to the American people like we're dumb. == **==** It's time the Democrats tell the truth about what's going on at our Southern border. Rather than uphold immigration law -- one of the most fundamental premises to being a country -- they have abandoned our border states to be overwhelmed by this crisis. **==** ** Thank you for standing up! body:
The Democrats are breaking fundraising records.

Friend, The Democrats are breaking fundraising records.

The reason I need to reach these goals before major deadlines like Monday's is so I can continue to fight for Americans, and after seeing what Biden, Schumer, and Pelosi have done to this country in just 2 months, I knew I had to reach out to supporters like you about this deadline.

Our biggest Mid-Month deadline yet is just 2 days away. Use the button below to help us reach our goal before we're out of time:

We need to be doing more to hold China accountable, we need to put a stop to the spread of socialism here in the United States, we need to take a stand against this new "cancel culture," and so much more...

If I fail to post a strong fundraising number after my deadline, the Democrats will call on their megadonors to flood Florida with money dedicated to defeating me. name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: Lara Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
body:
Friend,

_Lara Trump_ is seriously considering running for U.S. Senate here in North Carolina.

**[You can help us prevent a"Senator Trump" by donating today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/m9lubEYxuvEdMp0US3yj2jei4Ooj2NPkNIJJ7rjFUy0=/ULxtRd-xw3tJVT7QfGjLFXzqzCFEdslXkLSYzvH7eFY=?refcode=03/14&amount=25&recurring=1)**

Last week Senator Lindsey Graham said that he thinks Lara Trump's going to be the nominee in North Carolina and then this weekend twice impeached former President Trump encouraged her to jump into the race.

The last thing this country needs is another Trump in office and the last thing North Carolina needs is a representative who does not live here, who does not share our values and who will not fight for us.

[I will spend every day I'm in office fighting for the values and needs of families and workers across North Carolina, but our movement can't succeed without you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/m9lubEYxuvEdMp0US3yj2jei4Ooj2NPkNIJJ7rjFUy0=/ULxtRd-xw3tJVT7QfGjLFXzqzCFEdslXkLSYzvH7eFY=?refcode=03/14&amount=25&recurring=1)

I don't come from wealth or privilege. I don't have access (nor do I want access) to millionaires and billionaires at Mar-A-Lago. Lara Trump is for the powerful. Our movement is for the people.

This is a real grassroots, people-powered campaign. I'm relying on donors like you. **[Pitch in today and help power our grassroots movement to victory over Trump in 2022.](https://act.myngp.com/el/m9lubEYxuvEdMp0US3yj2jei4Ooj2NPkNIJJ7rjFUy0=/ULxtRd-xw3tJVT7QfGjLFXzqzCFEdslXkLSYzvH7eFY=?refcode=03/14&amount=25&recurring=1)**

Together, we can defeat Trump and usher in a new kind of politics in North Carolina and across the country.

One Of Us For All Of Us,
Erica

Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
---
Erica For US
PO Box 1236
Gaston NC 27832 United States

name: Roger Misso
subject: How we'll win in 2022: Recruit. Persuade. GOTV.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, our mission is to elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress. Last month, alongside our founder, former Congressman and Army Under Secretary Patrick Murphy, I announced our PAC's strategy for 2022: R-P-G.

Right now, we are in Phase One: [_**Recruit** veteran and military family candidates of integrity to run for office in competitive seats._](https://act.myngp.com/el/77h8iEZWR0NyxGRL28mKiugr_TZ7FIaGIQLVVGy0Zw0=/qJoFj1q5d2siSe5mKgdbOhlSxSYvAyGVwec4Zy6t1V0=)
Next, we will focus on Phase Two: [_**Persuade** veteran and military family voters in five key states with competitive U.S. Senate elections._](https://act.myngp.com/el/77h8iEZWR0NyxGRL28mKiugr_TZ7FIaGIQLVVGy0Zw0=/qJoFj1q5d2siSe5mKgdbOhlSxSYvAyGVwec4Zy6t1V0=)
Finally, we will go to Phase Three: [_**GOTV!** Get out the veteran and military family vote across the country._](https://act.myngp.com/el/77h8iEZWR0NyxGRL28mKiugr_TZ7FIaGIQLVVGy0Zw0=/qJoFj1q5d2siSe5mKgdbOhlSxSYvAyGVwec4Zy6t1V0=)

Our goal in 2022 is to **double** the number of veterans and military family members in Congress - and to **win at least five** U.S. Senate seats!

_**That 's why we need you. **_[_**For the next 24 hours, anyone who donates using this link will have their contribution matched 400% to support our strategy to elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress! Can you send us a contribution right now to fund our efforts?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/77h8iEZWR0NyxGRL28mKiugr_TZ7FIaGIQLVVGy0Zw0=/qJoFj1q5d2siSe5mKgdbOhlSxSYvAyGVwec4Zy6t1V0=)

Recruit. Persuade. GOTV. This is how we'll turn our successes from 2020 into big wins in 2022.

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/77h8iEZWR0NyxGRL28mKiugr_TZ7FIaGIQLVVGy0Zw0=/MH3eXykd6TcpXesseR-OEYxI7tiJcXVV0a1wvrQYSgg=)_

name: Moms for Fair Fight
subject: The Republican War on Voting
body:
Sundays are for voter fraud...GOP lawmakers want to rewrite election laws to prevent Democrats from repeating Biden’s success in the future. Georgia Voting Bill would also ban “line warming,” where volunteers offer water, chairs, and other items to voters waiting in line. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26247456/276353406/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2I1ZmI5LTEyODUtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J-3oyfZ8sZhVtRR9JPZ-irSSpjOwz8_gwnoJzEv2jXY=&emci=98e71b24-0785-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=43cb5fb9-1285-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131) **Georgia on my mind..** Republicans plan to disallow early voting on Sundays and they won't stop there. [**CHIP IN**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26247457/276353407/200467634?refcode=0314&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2I1ZmI5LTEyODUtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J-3oyfZ8sZhVtRR9JPZ-irSSpjOwz8_gwnoJzEv2jXY=) Hi Peter, Joe Biden signed the American Rescue Plan into law earlier this week and we have to thank organizers and activists in Georgia for our electoral success in 2020. Millions of Americans would not be receiving money in their pockets in the weeks to come if it would not be for activists on the ground and organizations like Fair Fight. This is why I feel compelled to reach out to you today Peter-- I can't stay silent about Republican sponsored voter suppression targeting communities of color. **[Republicans are close to passing laws in Georgia that would require photo ID in order to vote by mail, limit the number of secure drop boxes, and move back the deadline for requesting an absentee ballot.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26247458/276353408/200467634?refcode=0314&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2I1ZmI5LTEyODUtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J-3oyfZ8sZhVtRR9JPZ-irSSpjOwz8_gwnoJzEv2jXY=)** This is not everything. They also proposed to disallow early voting on Sundays. There is no convincing evidence that voter fraud is more likely to happen on Sundays. We do see a larger turnout of Democratic leaning black voters heading to the polls after church on Sundays. On Sundays 37% of earlier voters in the state of Georgia are black, compared with just 27% on other days. **These voter suppression laws would undermine the integrity of our elections and they directly target voters of color.** **[Stacey Abrams has described Republican efforts to restrict voting rights in Georgia as “racist” and “a redux of Jim Crow in a suit and tie”.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26247459/276353409/-143956526?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2I1ZmI5LTEyODUtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J-3oyfZ8sZhVtRR9JPZ-irSSpjOwz8_gwnoJzEv2jXY=&emci=98e71b24-0785-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=43cb5fb9-1285-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131) ** **Will you stand with[Moms for Fair Fight](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26247460/276353410/200467634?refcode=0314&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2I1ZmI5LTEyODUtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J-3oyfZ8sZhVtRR9JPZ-irSSpjOwz8_gwnoJzEv2jXY=) and help Stacey Abrams defend our right to vote in Georgia? ** Through emails like this, we were able to raise thousands of dollars from grassroots donors like you a few months ago to help flip the Senate blue. We were successful because we all came together to fight for our Democracy and deliver a big win in Georgia. **Peter, we don't have time to wait until 2022.** The voting restriction bill already passed the House in Georgia. Now is the time to stop them for restricting our right to vote. Please [**chip in**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26247461/276353411/200467634?refcode=0314&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2I1ZmI5LTEyODUtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J-3oyfZ8sZhVtRR9JPZ-irSSpjOwz8_gwnoJzEv2jXY=) what you can to help me and Moms for Fair Fight stop the Republican war on voting in Georgia. **Thank you for your support.** Simona Grace & Moms for Fair Fight [**CHIP IN**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26247462/276353412/200467634?refcode=0314&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2I1ZmI5LTEyODUtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J-3oyfZ8sZhVtRR9JPZ-irSSpjOwz8_gwnoJzEv2jXY=) clean_body: Sundays are for voter fraud...GOP lawmakers want to rewrite election laws to prevent Democrats from repeating Biden’s success in the future. Georgia Voting Bill would also ban “line warming,” where volunteers offer water, chairs, and other items to voters waiting in line. Georgia on my mind.. Republicans plan to disallow early voting on Sundays and they won't stop there. = Hi Peter, Joe Biden signed the American Rescue Plan into law earlier this week and we have to thank organizers and activists in Georgia for our electoral success in 2020. Millions of Americans would not be receiving money in their pockets in the weeks to come if it would not be for activists on the ground and organizations like Fair Fight. This is why I feel compelled to reach out to you today Peter-- I can't stay silent about Republican sponsored voter suppression targeting communities of color. = This is not everything. They also proposed to disallow early voting on Sundays. There is no convincing evidence that voter fraud is more likely to happen on Sundays. We do see a larger turnout of Democratic leaning black voters heading to the polls after church on Sundays. On Sundays 37% of earlier voters in the state of Georgia are black, compared with just 27% on other days. These voter suppression laws would undermine the integrity of our elections and they directly target voters of color. Will you stand with= and help Stacey Abrams defend our right to vote in Georgia? Through emails like this, we were able to raise thousands of dollars from grassroots donors like you a few months ago to help flip the Senate blue. We were successful because we all came together to fight for our Democracy and deliver a big win in Georgia. Peter, we don't have time to wait until 2022. The voting restriction bill already passed the House in Georgia. Now is the time to stop them for restricting our right to vote. Please = what you can to help me and Moms for Fair Fight stop the Republican war on voting in Georgia. Thank you for your support. Simona Grace & Moms for Fair Fight = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: Huge Laura Loomer breaking news be the 1st to know!
body:
Did you hear about the recent huge announcements from Laura Loomer, Donald Trump, and Ron Desantis that have an impact on you? | | | **Have you heard the great news?**
---
| |
---
| |
---
#### Dear Patriot,

In case you hadn't heard, I want you to be the first to know that I have filed to run for US Congress again in Florida’s 21st Congressional District, home to President Donald Trump, for the 2022 election cycle. In doing so, I am once again putting the Big-Tech Tyrants, the radical left, and members of the elite DC Political establishment-Swamp on notice.
---
| I am sending you this message from CPAC in Orlando, Florida where I just watched President Trump give his first speech since leaving office. At CPAC this year, the theme is ironically “America Uncanceled”. I am deeply honored by the outpouring of support I received from all of you during my last campaign, and I humbly request your continued support during my 2022 campaign so I can continue to fight for you and America. [_CLICK TO DONATE_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=97251d8107&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
| Americans are aware that for years, I have been patient zero in Big-Tech’s plot to silence and censor conservative voices and interfere in our elections. Candidates have come to depend on social media to efficiently and effectively get their messages to voters, fundraise, advertise, and participate in public discourse. As the **most banned woman in the world** and the first de-platformed candidate in US history, I know firsthand of the dangers this poses to personal liberty, our constitutional right to free speech, free and fair elections, and the concept of sovereign nations.
---
| |
---
Americans are now just learning about how dangerous Big Tech’s unchecked power has become after these Silicon Valley companies coordinated to de-platform Donald J. Trump, while he was still a sitting US President, from social media, the internet, and even the banking systems. [_Will you help?_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=bb1da319ab&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
| We need leaders in Congress like myself who actually understand this vital issue of Big-Tech censorship and the way it impacts the lives of Americans and the integrity of our elections. [_**Donate today**_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=eefdedebda&e=4d7c0901a7) to help me launch my 2022 campaign and break up the Big-Tech monopolies.
---
| If Big Tech is permitted to collude for the sake of blocking conservatives and their chosen candidates from participating in and discussing political issues in the digital public square, then they must face criminal charges for their outright election interference which violates the bedrock of our democracy, both here in America and world-wide. The only way a candidate has a chance to win when this occurs, is with overwhelming financial donations (small and large) and on-the-ground grassroots support from patriotic, generous, and devoted supporters and donors like yourself from all over the country. [_**Can I count on your HELP?**_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=fb410ff9a4&e=4d7c0901a7) **Without Social Media and equal access to payment processors, my campaign has been forced to use alternatives and sometimes more costly mechanisms to communicate our vital America First platform with voters. **
---
| Despite being challenged by the economic impacts of COVID-19, my incredible supporters and donors, which includes **YOU** , helped my campaign raise much appreciated donations to mount an aggressive campaign with limited face-to-face ability that won a crowded primary with six candidates, and had an _impressive finish in the general election against entrenched, radical Democrat incumbent Lois Frankel_.
---
| This amazing effort was only possible because of generous supporters like **yourself** , and endorsements from President Trump, Judge Jeanine Pirro, Rep. Matt Gaetz, Rep. Paul Gosar, Roger Stone, General Flynn, “Bo Snerdley”, and more! People never would have imagined that Big-Tech’s efforts, _**which have gone unchecked by Congress for years**_ , would accelerate to target elected officials, including the President of the United States, arguably the most powerful person in the world!
---
| I always knew this would happen, and I was warning voters on the campaign trail in 2020, and years before, that if they could silence me, they would silence President Trump, which means **YOU** could be next! **It was just said yesterday at CPAC by President Trump that "Trump's endorsement is the most powerful endorsement in politics.". I am proud to have earned President Trump's endorsement and his vote as the Republican nominee for Congress in FL CD 21 in 2020. FL 21 is the home to President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump. **

I am without question the leading expert on this issue and I need your [_**help**_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=a289767d4e&e=4d7c0901a7) to get to Congress to fight against Big-Tech censorship, voter fraud, and the many other issues important to Americans and small business owners who have experienced unimaginable challenges and losses over the last year as we have witnessed unconstitutional mandates and lock downs that threaten our God given rights and Constitutional freedoms. Big-Tech censorship and election interference is hands-down the most important issue facing America, because if we are silenced, and the Big-Tech tyrants get to choose election winners and losers via censorship, then we will never again have a free and fair election in America! This is one of the main reasons why I have immediately filed to run for Congress again and need your support. **Help my campaign reach our first fundraising goal of $100,000 by donating [_here_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=6630b93dc1&e=4d7c0901a7) today! **
---
| We need your help to break fundraising records beyond that goal to send a message to Big-Tech that we _won’t tolerate their cancel culture and election interference anymore!_ Be a part of making history and help us shatter our goal by clicking _[here](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=618484c196&e=4d7c0901a7)._
---
| Thank you so much for your support,
---
|
---
| | Laura Loomer
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 www.LauraLoomerForCongress.com, All rights reserved._

Laura Loomer for Congress, Inc.
720 Lucerne Ave #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=319a0fcd77) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=319a0fcd77).
---
